text:
Created attachment 234298
prometheus2-2.33.5.diff

- Update to 2.33.5, the most recent version that has assets;
- Switch to GO_MODULE, this port dependency graph seems to be too complex for modules2tuple to digest.

I didn't attempt to run it, but poudriere testport passes in 130a, 130i and 123a.
